[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100100000 2
1 001100001 3
2 001100000 2
3 001100000 2
4 010000000 1
5 001100000 2
6 000000101 2
7 001110001 4
